paragraph: Single-family homes dominate Washington Township's market with 35 sales over six months at a median of $850,000, and this is a real seller's market. Homes are selling above asking over 77 percent of the time, the sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.09, and the median time on market is 14 days. Sellers are dictating terms here, and if your home is priced right and in move-in condition, you'll likely see multiple offers. The range is wide, from $540,000 to $1.71 million, which tells you the township spans everything from solid starter homes to significant estate properties. Condos and townhouses are a smaller slice with 8 sales at a median of $742,500, also moving fast at 14 days on market with 88 percent selling above asking. The sale-to-list ratio of 1.05 confirms this tier is competitive as well. If you're deciding between a single-family home and a condo in Washington Township, the market heat isn't the differentiator. It's whether you want the space and grounds of a single-family or the low-maintenance lifestyle of a condo.
